⏸ Pause Voucher?
Pausing will stop customers from redeeming it. You can reactivate it anytime. All existing redemptions are kept.
▶ Reactivate Voucher?
will go live immediately and customers can start redeeming it again.
🗑 Delete Voucher?
This will permanently delete . This action cannot be undone. Only delete if this voucher was never shared with customers.
